race_meta.race_name: Midnite: Built For 2026 Not 2006 Handicap (GBBPlus Race)

ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Actual winner caliban (ire) was not in model's ranked horses. Model focused too heavily on pre-race favorites. Top prediction was Caliban with 48.0% confidence.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Caliban > Charlie's Choice, but actual result was Caliban (IRE) > Midnight Rumble. Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Actual winner not found in market analysis. Market dynamics shifted unexpectedly from pre-race state.
